在專家模式中，角色死亡將會被移動到對應的下層聯盟: A character killed in Hardcore is moved to its parent league.
你可以貢獻你的黯幣給公會並讓會長購買公會商品。如果公會會長接受你的貢獻，在三個月: Use this form to send points to your Guild to allow your Guild Leader to purchase Microtransactions. If the Guild Leader accepts your points you can not be kicked out for three months.
下面是你所在公會的公會成員貢獻紀錄。你可以接受貢獻以增加公會黯幣。若是你接受了一: This is a list of points transfers from members of your Guild. Accept transactions to credit the points to your Guild. You will not be able to kick a player for three months if you accept their points.

需要輸入密碼來加入此聯盟。: League requires a password to join.
你可以選擇進入其他流亡者所正在進行的地圖。: Allows you to select other people\'s instances in the instance manager.
所有難度下，死亡時的經驗懲罰提升到 30 %。: Increases the death experience penalty by 30% on all difficulty levels.
非在隊伍內的成員將會被預設為敵人。: Non-partymembers are hostile by default when you are not partied.
當殺死一個其他的流亡者時，你會獲得其因死亡所損失的經驗值。: When killing a player, their death penalty is awarded to the player doing the killing.
非城鎮地圖內的流亡者上限提高一倍。隊伍人數上限並不會因此而增加。: Doubles player capacity in non-town instances. Does not increase the party size.
怪物的移動、攻擊及施放速度加快 60 %。: Monsters move, attack and cast 60% faster.
你不能與他人組隊。: You may not party in this league.
你一但選擇昇華職業後就無法改動。: You cannot change your Ascendancy class once it has been chosen.
極端物品稀缺和其它改動會有著非常不一樣的遊戲體驗。: A significantly different game experience with extreme item scarcity, among other changes.

這個網站可以讓你搜尋列在交易論壇中或是遊戲中公開高級倉庫頁中的道具。: This website allows you to search through items listed for sale in Shop Forums as well as those listed using Public Premium Stash Tabs in-game.
你可以在\"搜尋道具\"區塊，使用道具的名稱或是道具的基本種類搜尋。: You can search by an item\'s name or an item\'s base type using the "Search Items" field.
玩家的線上／離線狀態每 5 分鐘左右更新一次。: Players will have their Online/Offline status updated approximately every 5 minutes.
雖然搜尋相當簡單，但你還是要聯絡賣方以完成交易步驟。: While searching is easy, you will still have to contact the player selling the item in order to complete the trade.
與玩家聯繫最簡單的方式是使用“直接密語”功能。這需要你和賣家都在線上且遊戲中才能: The easiest way to contact a player is to use the "Direct Whisper" feature. It requires that both you and the seller are online and in-game to use.
請注意：密語將會翻譯為賣方當地的語言。: Please note: The whisper message will be translated into the seller\'s local language.
如果你不想看到某些玩家的物品，可以使用\"黑名單\"功能，從你的搜尋結果中移除他: If for any reason you no longer wish to view a certain player\'s listings, you can use the "Ignore Player" button to remove their listings from your search results.

Multiple "Crucible Passive Tree Path" groups will be applied together for each path.

悉妮蔻拉的髮絲讓你可以預見下一個使用於物品上的通貨結果。當物品被調整時，髮絲會被: Hinekora\'s Lock allows you to forsee the result of the next Currency Item used on this item. The Lock is removed when this item is modified.
如果該統計資料存在，則對符合每項統計資料的「min」和「max」要求的項目進行配: Match items that meet each stat\'s `min` and `max` requirements if the stat is present.
計算每個符合「min」和「max」（除非另外提供數值，否則適用）要求的統計資料。: Count each stat that meets the `min` and `max` (if provided, otherwise existence) requirements.\nUse the group\'s `min` and `max` to filter items based on the count of matching stats.
在將統計值乘以「weight」並加總前，檢查每個統計資料是否符合「min」和「m: Check each stat meets the `min` and `max` (if provided, otherwise existence) requirements before multiplying the stat value by the `weight` and finally summing them together.\nUse the group\'s `min` and `max` to filter items based on the total summed value.
符合「min」和「max」（除非另外提供數值，否則適用）要求的每個統計值都將在進: Each stat value that meets the `min` and `max` (if provided, otherwise existence) requirements will be multiplied by the `weight` before being summed together.\nUse the group\'s `min` and `max` to filter items based on the total summed value.

對目標進行一次強而有力的打擊，擊退敵人並削弱他們的護甲。: Strike with a forceful blow, knocking enemies back and weakening their Armour.

輔助你自己使用或由你觸發的近戰攻擊。被輔助技能對流血敵人造成最後一擊而觸發擊殺效: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself or that you Trigger. On-Kill effects caused by Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies have a chance to occur twice.
輔助你自己使用的打擊，每隔幾秒便會提供強力的先祖強化。無法輔助引導技能，且無法改: Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.
輔助擊中敵人的技能，使擊中根據造成物理傷害的一部分造成破甲。以被輔助技能完全破甲: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt. On Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills, you gain an Endurance Charge.
輔助戰吼，使其消耗盛怒來略過平常的冷卻時間。: Supports Warcries, causing them to expend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其點燃時造成曝曬。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when Igniting.
輔助十字弓技能，使過去 8 秒內由該技能裝填的每支弩箭造成更多傷害。: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 8 seconds.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其造成暴擊時刷新點燃效果。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to refresh Ignites on Critical Hit.
輔助攻擊技能。被輔助技能擊中時也會造成切割，使敵人更容易受到流血效果。造成流血時: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills inflict Incision on Hit, which causes Enemies to be increasingly more likely to be inflicted with Bleeding. All Incision is removed from a target on inflicting it with Bleeding.
輔助具有引爆時間的技能，使這些技能的引爆時間明顯延長、爆炸傷害明顯提高。: Supports Skills which have a Detonation Time, causing those Skills to have much higher Detonation Time and detonation damage.
輔助近戰攻擊技能，增強其物理傷害，但犧牲攻擊速度。: Supports Melee Attacks, boosting their Physical damage at the cost of Attack Speed.
輔助任何你自己使用或觸發的傷害技能，使其消耗盛怒來造成更多傷害。如果你的盛怒不足: Supports any damaging skill that you use or trigger yourself, causing it to consume Rage to deal more damage. If you don't have enough Rage to consume, the damage bonus will not apply.
輔助你自己使用的近戰攻擊技能。當你越接近沉重暈眩狀態，被輔助的技能便會獲得越高的: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain much more damage and are more capable of Stunning Enemies the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.
輔助在經過一段時間後引爆的技能，大幅縮短其引爆前的時間，但使其傷害減少。: Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, massively shortening the time before Detonation at the cost of Damage.
輔助你自己使用的重擊技能。被輔助技能擊中點燃和完全破甲的敵人時，會被視為粉碎重擊: Supports Slam Skills you use yourself. Hits from Supported Skills are considered Crushing Blows against Enemies which are both Ignited and Fully Armour Broken. Hits with Supported Skills that Heavily Stun Ignited and Fully Armour Broken Enemies will Intimidate them.
輔助會產生圖騰的技能，使這些技能更加快速地放置圖騰。被輔助的技能所產生的圖騰會增: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly. Totems created by Supported Skills have increased Attack and Cast Speed.
輔助近戰打擊技能。被輔助技能在你使用荊棘傷害進行反擊後，會在擊中時造成兩次荊棘傷: Supports Melee Strike Skills. Supported Skills deal your Thorns Damage on Hit twice after you've Retaliated with Thorns Damage.
輔助任何可擊中敵人的技能，使其對流血敵人造成更多近戰物理傷害，但本身無法造成流血: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more Melee Physical Damage to Bleeding Enemies, but be unable to inflict Bleeding itself. Supported Skills also inflict Incision on Hit.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其造成流血。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Bleeding.
輔助任何造成傷害的技能，犧牲所有其他傷害類型來提升其物理傷害，並使該技能的擊中有: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types, as well as giving Hits from that skill a chance to ignore Physical Damage reduction.
輔助你自己使用的攻擊技能。 若你被包圍，被輔助技能的擊中傷害會視為帶來幸運，而魔: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Hit Damage from Supported Skills is Lucky and Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used if you are Surrounded.
輔助十字弓彈藥技能，使其犧牲裝填速度來額外裝填一發弩箭。以被輔助的技能對敵人造成: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed. Supported Skills will also automatically reload when they Heavy Stun an enemy.
輔助攻擊。被輔助技能擊中的敵人身上每有一個元素異常狀態，便會造成更多的傷害，但被: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Damage for each Elemental Ailment on Enemies they Hit. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Elemental Ailments.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其對貧血狀態的敵人造成更多傷害，且當你在貧血狀態時，會: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life, as well as dealing more damage while you are on Low Life.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使擊中無視敵人的火焰抗性。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits ignore enemy Fire resistance.
輔助你自己使用的重擊技能，每隔數秒提供非常強力的先祖強化。: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a very powerful Ancestral Boost infrequently.
輔助造成傷害的技能，提高其擊中的最大物理傷害。: Supports Skills which deal Damage, increasing the maximum Physical Damage of their Hits.
輔助躍至空中的技能，使其在你落地時生成奉獻地面: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Consecrated Ground when you land
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其更容易點燃並使造成的點燃更快造成傷害。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite and causing inflicted Ignites to deal their damage more quickly.
輔助重擊技能。被輔助重擊技能產生的餘震必定會產生碎裂地面。: Supports Slam skills. Aftershocks caused by Supported Slam Skills always create patches of Jagged Ground.
輔助攻擊技能，使其物理傷害可以偷取生命，且此方法獲得的偷取不會在滿血時被移除。: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life and preventing Leech gained this way from being removed at full Life.
輔助會生成地面的技能，使生成的地面持續時間大幅延長，同時降低受其影響敵人的冷卻時: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer as well as lowering the Cooldown Recovery Speed of affected Enemies. Ground Surfaces from Supported Skills only end when their duration expires.
輔助近戰攻擊，使其擊中時賦予盛怒。你的盛怒未達最大時，受輔助技能攻擊速度大幅提高: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit. Supported Skills have signficantly higher Attack speed while you are not at maximum Rage.
輔助任何你自己使用或觸發的傷害技能，使其消耗盛怒來造成更多傷害，有一定機率在不消: Supports any damaging skill that you use or trigger yourself, causing it to consume Rage to deal more damage, with a chance to skip consuming Rage while still benefitting as though it had. If you don't have enough Rage to consume, the damage bonus will not apply.
輔助旗幟技能，使範圍內敵人得到折射分解，該減益效果或降低元素抗性。: Supports Banner Skills, causing Enemies within their area to gain Refractive Dissolution, a Debuff which lowers Elemental Resistances.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其暈眩累積大幅加快但減少傷害。: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun significantly more quickly, at the cost of Damage.
輔助在地面製造裂縫的近戰攻擊，使其犧牲傷害和攻擊速度來製造額外的裂縫。: Supports Melee Attacks which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional fissures at the cost of damage and attack speed.
輔助可消耗連擊的技能。以被輔助的技能消耗連擊時，你有機率會根據消耗的連擊數量獲得: Supports Skills which can expend Combo. On expending Combo with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain Power Charges based on the amount of Combo expended.
輔助十字弓技能，賦予一定機率在被輔助技能造成擊殺時，裝填一發弩箭至所有十字弓彈藥: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting a chance to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill with Supported Skill.
輔助任何可以擊中敵人的技能，目標身上越多中毒效果，使其造成的傷害逐漸提高。: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.
輔助十字弓彈藥技能，使其裝填多發額外弩箭。被輔助的技能無法正常重新裝填，而是在你: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load multiple extra bolts. Supported Skills cannot reload normally, instead loading bolts when you Dodge.
輔助可強化本身以外技能的技能，使強化的技能將敵人撲殺。: Supports skills that can Empower skills other than themselves, causing skills they Empower to Cull enemies.
輔助你自己使用的技能。若有可消耗的狂怒球，在使用被輔助的技能時，會消耗一顆狂怒球: Supports Skills that you use yourself. Supported Skills will consume a Frenzy Charge on use if possible, and will gain significant Skill Speed if they do. Supported Skills cannot generate Frenzy Charges.
輔助你自己使用，且不須使用條件的攻擊技能。被輔助技能只能在你移動一定距離後使用，: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills can only be used after you have moved a certain distance, but will Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance. Cannot support Skills which have a Cooldown or that are Triggered, and does not modify skills used by Minions.
輔助同時只能擁有有限數量效果的技能，將上限增加至兩倍，但使用時會詛咒你自己。僅適: Supports skills which can have a Limited number of effects active at once, doubling that Limit at the cost of Cursing yourself on Skill use. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".
輔助擊中敵人的技能，使其擊殺的敵人賦予更多的生命藥劑充能。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Life Flask charges.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，當敵人與你的距離越近，技能造成的釘身累積更高。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing any Pin buildup it inflicts to be stronger the closer the enemy is to you.
輔助會造成傷害性擊中的技能，使被輔助技能造成流血的基礎機率改為套用至中毒的基礎機: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits, causing base chance to inflict Bleed with Supported Skills to instead apply to base chance to Poison, and causing base chance to Poison to instead apply to Bleed.
輔助擊中敵人的技能，使其擊殺的敵人賦予更多的魔力藥劑充能。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Mana Flask charges.
輔助會造成傷害型擊中的技能。被輔助的技能造成的擊中無法擊殺敵人。: Supports Skills that cause Damaging Hits. Hits from Supported Skills cannot kill Enemies.
輔助會造成傷害型擊中的技能，使其擊中將敵人元素抗性視為顛倒。: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, causing those Hits to treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted.
輔助攻擊技能，賦予其攻擊速度，但犧牲傷害；或是賦予傷害，但犧牲攻擊速度，根據其使: Supports Attack skills, granting them Attack Speed at the cost of Damage or Damage at the cost of Attack Speed depending on Weapon Set they are used in. Does not modify skills used by Minions.
輔助投射物技能以及可連鎖的技能。當最初擊中一名感電的敵人時，被輔助的技能必定會連: Supports Projectile Skills and Skills which can Chain. Supported Skills always Chain when initially Hitting a Shocked Enemy, but cannot themselves inflict Shock. Does not support Skills which cannot Chain.
輔助可造成傷害性擊中的技能。你的盛怒越高，被輔助的技能施加的中毒造成傷害的速度越: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Poison inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your Rage.
輔助會造成傷害型擊中的技能，賦予其額外混沌傷害，並使混沌傷害貢獻至冰凍累積。: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Freeze Buildup.
輔助攻擊，使其獲得閃電傷害，但造成更少冰冷和火焰傷害。: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Lightning Damage but deal less Cold and Fire Damage.
輔助會造成傷害性擊中的技能。被輔助技能對被致盲的敵人更容易造成暴擊，並會對被致盲: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills are more likely to Critically Hit Blinded Enemies, and deal more Damage with Critical Hits against Blinded Enemies, but cannot themselves inflict Blind.
輔助投射物技能和任何其它會連鎖的技能，使其造成額外連鎖次數。: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.
輔助可產生能量球的技能，使其在產生能量球時，有一定機率產生一顆額外的能量球。: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so.
輔助你自己使用的近戰攻擊。在累積足夠的連擊之前，被輔助的技能無法使用，但可提高造: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo, or Triggered Skills.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，造成中毒並且會破壞敵人的護甲。無法輔助會消耗完全破甲的護: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Poison it applies to also Break enemy Armour. Cannot support skills that Consume Fully Broken Armour.
輔助會在連擊最後造成最終打擊的打擊技能，使你可以連續使用兩次最終打擊。: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, allowing you to use the Final Strike twice in succession.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其造成額外[中毒]，但縮短中毒持續時間。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing it to inflict an extra Poison on enemies but shortening the duration of those Poisons.
輔助攻擊，使其增加命中值。: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy.
輔助那些同時只能擁有有限數量效果的技能，增加該上限，但會縮短效果持續時間。僅適用: Supports skills which can have a Limited number of effects active at once, increasing that Limit at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".
輔助你自己使用的攻擊，使用被輔助的技能擊殺感電敵人後，你的所有攻擊在短時間內都會: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Killing a Shocked enemy with supported skills imbues all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，在撲殺敵人時恢復生命。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Life when it Culls an enemy.
輔助投射物技能，使其發射額外的投射物，同時降低被輔助技能的攻擊和施法速度，並減少: Supports Projectile skills, making them fire extra Projectiles. Also lowers Attack and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.
輔助使用時消耗暴擊球、狂怒球或耐力球的技能，使其有一定機率不消耗能量球，卻能獲得: Supports skills that consume Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charges on use, giving them a chance not to remove each Charge while still gaining the benefits of consuming them.
輔助投射物技能，使其投射物穿透擊中的敵人，但穿透後造成的傷害會降低。: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an enemy but deal less damage after doing so.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其物理傷害可以釘身，但無法再擊暈敵人。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，有一定機率使敵人中毒。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies.
輔助持續性的增益技能，使你在該技能啟動期間，可以獲得更多的命中值。: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Accuracy while the Skill is active.
輔助投射物技能，使投射物的行進更為快速。: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster.
輔助投射物技能，使投射物的行進更為緩慢。: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel more slowly.
輔助近戰攻擊。若你在過去八秒內以投射物攻擊擊中，被輔助技能造成的近戰傷害便會提高: Supports Melee Attacks. Supported Skills deal more Melee damage if you have struck with a Projectile Attack Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Projectile Damage.
輔助攻擊，使攻擊加快。: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster.
輔助生成投射物的技能。若你在過去八秒內以近戰擊中，被輔助技能的投射物傷害便會提高: Supports Skills which create Projectiles. Supported Skills deal more damage with Projectiles if you have struck with a Melee Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Melee Damage.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其更容易施加感電。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Shock.
輔助任何技能，使得施加的緩速效果更強。: Supports any skill, causing inflicted Slows to be more powerful.
輔助任何造成傷害的技能，使其造成更多非異常狀態的持續傷害，但縮短其持續時間。: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing it to deal more non-Ailment damage over time but have a shorter duration.
輔助在完美時機釋放將擁有特殊效果的引導技能，使其在完美時機釋放時造成更多傷害，但: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.
輔助擲彈技能。被輔助技能之擲彈不會彈跳，而是直接停在最初落地的位置，並在引爆時造: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land, but doing lower damage when they detonate.
輔助會造成傷害性擊中的技能。由這些擊中造成的流血對中毒敵人具有更強的效果，且由被: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Bleeding inflicted by those Hits is more effective against Poisoned Enemies, and Poison inflicted by Supported Skills is more effective against Bleeding Enemies.
輔助十字弓彈藥技能，在射擊時有機率不消耗弩箭。: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其擊中時致盲敵人。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使得擊殺的敵人也會賦予更多藥劑和護符充能。: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.
輔助你自己使用的攻擊。每次使用被輔助的技能會提高其攻擊速度，但在短時間內過於頻繁: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills gain more Attack speed each time you use them, but will become unusable if used too frequently in a short time frame.
輔助你自己使用或由你觸發的任何技能。被輔助技能無法透過任何方式消耗能量球或灌注。: Supports any Skill you use yourself or that you Trigger. Supported Skills cannot consume Charges  or Infusion by any means. Cannot Support Skills which require Charges or Infusion to be used.
輔助你自己使用或觸發、會造成傷害性擊中的技能。若你在施加被輔助技能時有異常狀態，: Supports Skills you use yourself or Trigger, which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills inflict more powerful Ailments if you are afflicted with those Ailments when you inflict them, while also removing from you any Ailment that they inflict.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其造成更少傷害，但造成更強效的中毒。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Poison.
輔助需要達成特定條件才能使用的技能。被輔助的技能在達到特定條件後可額外使用一次，: Supports Skills which require some Condition to be met for use. Supported Skills can be used an additional time after their Condition has been met, but meeting that Condition is harder.
輔助所產生物件遭擊中數次後會被破壞的技能，使其可承受額外次數的擊中。無法修改由召: Supports Skills which create objects that are destroyed after being Hit a number of times, allowing for them to last for additional Hits. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.
輔助所有能夠造成傷害的技能。被輔助的技能造成的閃電傷害可以引發觸電，但被輔助的技: Supports any Skill which can deal Damage. Lightning Damage from Supported Skills can inflict Electrocute, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Shock.
輔助攻擊，使其在遠處造成更多傷害。: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage from farther away.
輔助你自己使用或由你觸發的攻擊技能，使其在擊中時消耗受招架減益效果，來賦予你一個: Supports Attacks you use yourself or that you Trigger, causing them to Consume the Parried Debuff on Hit to grant you a Frenzy Charge. Cannot support Skills which already Consume the Parried Debuff.
輔助攻擊技能，使其在擊殺受冰凍敵人時產生寒冰碎片。無法輔助圖騰技能，且無法修改由: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to create Ice Fragments on killing Frozen Enemies. Cannot Support Totem Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.
輔助任何消耗能量球的技能，賦予一定機率使該次消耗獲得的增益加倍。: Supports any Skill that Consumes Charges, granting a chance for benefits of that Consumption to be doubled.
輔助任何擊中敵人或造成感電的技能，使其感電的頻率較低，但持續時間更長。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies or inflicts Shock, causing its Shocks to be inflicted less often but last longer.
輔助任何可擊中敵人的技能，使擊中穿透敵人閃電抗性。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Lightning resistance.
輔助攻擊，使其癱瘓敵人。: Supports Attacks, causing them to Maim enemies.
輔助印記技能。受被輔助印記影響的敵人會因為受到物理傷害而發生護甲破壞。: Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.
輔助任何由你自己使用的傷害技能，若在使用技能時移動足夠的距離，則技能會造成更多傷: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal more damage if you move a sufficient distance while using the skill. Teleportation does not count towards the distance travelled.
輔助你自己使用的攻擊技能。被輔助技能的暴擊會造成更多傷害，但暴擊一名敵人會使自己: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills deal more Damage with Critical Hits, but Critically Hitting an Enemy with them will Daze you for a short time.
輔助對一片範圍造成傷害的攻擊技能。被輔助技能會大幅增加效果範圍，但命中附近目標的: Supports Attack Skills which deal Damage in an Area. Supported Skills have significantly increased Area of Effect, but are less Accurate against nearby targets.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其物理傷害可以釘身，但無法再擊暈敵人，同時賦予對於受禁: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun, as well as granting Critial Hit Chance against Immobilised enemies.
輔助具冷卻時間的技能，使其在該次冷卻時間內可額外使用一次。\n無法輔助立即施放或:
Supports skills with cooldowns, giving them extra uses of that cooldown.
Cannot support instant or triggered skills, or modify the skills of minions.
輔助跳向空中並造成傷害的技能，使其首次對敵人造成暴擊時製造感電地面。: Supports Skills that leap into the air and deal damage, causing them to create Shocked Ground the first time they Critically Hit an enemy.
輔助可讓敵人中毒的技能，中毒敵人會隨時間經過累積疫源，死亡時引起疫源爆發。無法輔: Supports skills that can Poison enemies, causing Poisoned enemies to gain Plague over time and explode in a Plague Burst on death. Cannot support the skills of Minions.
輔助所有會製造投射物的技能，讓這些投射物在擊中地形時，有機會造成連鎖。: Supports any Skill which creates Projectiles, giving those Projectiles a chance to Chain when impacting terrain.
輔助你自己使用的投射物攻擊技能。當你移動時，被輔助的技能會獲得電流充能，直至達到: Supports Projectile Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain Voltaic Charge as you move, up to a maximum. When used, Supported Skills expend that Charge to gain extra Lightning Damage.
輔助擲彈技能。被輔助技能之擲彈不會彈跳，而是直接停在最初落地的位置。: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land.
輔助弓的攻擊。被輔助的技能會指示四個方向的其中一個，並會在被輔助技能之攻擊與該方: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.
輔助, 攻擊, 範圍效果, 投射物, 觸發, 持續時間, 危險: Support, Attack, AoE, Projectile, Trigger, Duration, Hazard
輔助遠程長矛攻擊。被輔助技能生成的投射物抵達飛行終點時，便會生成蒺藜。: Supports Ranged Spear Attacks. Supported Skills create Caltrops when Projectiles they create reach the end of their flight.
輔助弓的攻擊。每以被輔助技能發出三次射擊，恢復其一部分的魔力消耗，並獲得額外閃電: Supports Bow Attacks. Every third shot with Supported Skills restores a portion of it's Mana cost and Gains Damage as extra Lightning Damage.
輔助攻擊，使其在你與敵人的距離越近時造成更多傷害。: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.
輔助你自己使用的近戰攻擊。在累積足夠的連擊之前，被輔助的技能無法使用，但可大幅提: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal massively more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo, or Triggered Skills.
輔助具冷卻時間的技能，增加其冷卻時間恢復速度。無法改變召喚物技能。: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
輔助近戰攻擊技能。當你以其他近戰攻擊成功打擊敵人時，被輔助的技能獲得連擊。使用被: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills reset their Combo on use, dealing more Damage the higher Combo you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.
輔助捷光環技能，使其觸發效果造成更高的傷害，但其精魂消耗提高。: Supports Herald Skills, making their triggered effects deal more damage at the expense of higher Spirit cost.
輔助可在移動期間使用的技能，使你在使用時移動較慢，但賦予更多傷害作為交換。: Supports skills that can be used while moving, causing you to move slower while using them, but granting more damage in exchange.
輔助投射物技能，使投射物分岔。: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Fork.
輔助發射投射物、非以地面為目標的技能。來自被輔助技能的投射物會隨機分岔、連鎖或穿: Supports Skills which fire Projectiles that are not ground targeted. Projectiles from Supported Skills randomly Fork, Chain or Pierce.
輔助攻擊，使其增加命中且必定命中滿血敵人。: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy, and never miss against Enemies on full Life.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，在撲殺敵人時恢復魔力。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Mana when it Culls an enemy.
輔助移動時可使用的技能，讓你在使用時移動得更快。: Supports skills that can be used while moving, allowing you to move faster while using them.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能。當附近敵人可觸電時會被標記，以受輔助技能擊中被標記的敵人: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Nearby enemies are marked when they are Primed for Electrocution, and hitting a marked enemy with a supported skill will Electrocute them.
輔助投射物技能，使其投射物穿透一名擊中的敵人。: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an enemy.
輔助打擊技能。被輔助的技能有機會在擊中時累積額外的連擊。不能輔助召喚物使用的技能: Supports Strike Skills. Supported Skills have a chance to build additional Combo on Hit. Cannot support Skills used by Minions.
輔助近戰攻擊技能。被輔助的技能擊退敵人時會施加易攻目標，使他們被下一個投射物攻擊: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills apply Easy Target when Knocking Back Enemies, causing the next Projectile Attack Hit they take to deal increased Damage.
輔助會產生危險的技能。被輔助技能產生的危險有機會在觸發後重新佈署一小段時間。: Supports Skills which create Hazards. Hazards created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.
輔助你自己使用、會發射投射物的攻擊技能。被輔助的技能會持續累積封印，並在使用時將: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which fire Projectiles. Supported Skills accumulate Seals over time, and consume them when used. For each Seal consumed, the Attack will fire additional Projectiles. Projectiles from Supported Skills are fired in random directions. Cannot Support Skills which require Combo, have a Cooldown or already gain Seals.
輔助十字弓彈藥技能。被輔助的技能攻擊速度及弩箭裝填數量大幅增加，但造成更少傷害且: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Attack speed and bolt capacity, but deal less damage and have longer reload time.
輔助持續增益效果的技能，使你在被輔助技能生效期間，施加在你身上的冰凍效果持續時間: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Freeze applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
輔助會在連擊最後造成最終打擊的打擊技能，使你可以連續使用兩次最終打擊。同時，非最: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, allowing you to use the Final Strike twice in succession, and causing Non-Final Strike Attacks to be faster.
輔助攻擊技能，使其擊中稀有和傳奇敵人時造成撲殺效果。: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit.
輔助會產生危險的技能，使這些危險只會在創造後立即觸發，或在持續時間結束時觸發。產: Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to only be able to trigger immediately after creation or at the end of their duration. Created Hazards have significantly lowered duration, and deal more damage.
輔助你自己使用，且不須使用條件的攻擊技能。被輔助技能只能在你移動一定距離後使用，: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills can only be used after you have moved a certain distance, but have massively increased Skill Speed. Cannot support Skills which have a Cooldown or that are Triggered, and does not modify skills used by Minions.
輔助攻擊，使它們在擊中時造成穿刺，但本身無法引出穿刺。: Supports Attacks, causing them to Impale on Hit but making them unable to Extract Impale themselves.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其感電時造成曝曬。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when inflicting Shock.
輔助十字弓彈藥技能，使裝填弩箭的速度大幅加快。: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to Reload bolts significantly faster.
輔助投射物技能，使其發射額外環狀投射物，但傷害較低。無法輔助從上方降下投射物的技: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire extra Projectiles in a circle, at the cost of Damage. Does not support Skills which rain down  Projectiles from above.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，提升其感電效果但也會反射給你。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making its Shocks more effective but reflecting them back to you as well.
輔助發射擲彈的技能，使發射的擲彈有機率再次啟動，但是延長其冷卻時間。: Supports Skills which fire Grenades, giving fired Grenades a chance to activate again, but lengthening their cooldowns.
輔助完美時機時使用具有效益的技能。成功在完美時機擊中敵人時，被輔助的技能會給予至: Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfect Timing. Supported Skills grant at least one Endurance Charge when Hitting an enemy with Perfect Timing.
輔助能因完美時機而受益的技能。以被輔助的技能成功施展完美時機時，將會獲得能強化傷: Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Perfection, which is a powerful damage buff. However, failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Perfection) will remove all Perfection on you.
輔助投射物技能，使投射物的行進更為快速，並賦予其一定機率穿透敵人。: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and granting them a chance to Pierce Enemies.
輔助你自己以弓或長矛使用的投射物攻擊。被輔助技能初始會造成較低的傷害，但會生成靈: Supports Bow or Spear Projectile Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills deal lower damage initially, but generate Spectral Projectiles, which deal more damage when they fire. Spectral Projectiles linger and will fire a short duration after no new Spectral Projectiles have been created. Cannot support Channelling Skills, Leaping skills, or skills which rain Projectiles from above.
輔助弓的攻擊。被輔助的技能會指示四個方向的其中一個，並會在被輔助技能之攻擊與該方: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction fire additional Projectiles. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.
輔助十字弓彈藥技能，以裝填速度為代價，在射擊時有機率不消耗弩箭。: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing, at the cost of Reload speed.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其擊中時致盲敵人且效果增加。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit with increased effect.
輔助, 攻擊, 範圍效果, 近戰, 重擊, 物理, 危險: Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Slam, Physical, Hazard
輔助重擊技能。被輔助技能會在地面上產生危險的荊棘，持續一段時間後啟動。接觸這些荊: Supports Slam Skills. Supported Skills create Hazardous Brambles on the ground that activate after a duration. Enemies which come in contact with these thorns take damage and are Maimed. A maximum of 20 Brambles are allowed at one time. Does not modify Skills used by Minions or Totems.
輔助可產生能量球的技能，使其在產生能量球時，有一定機率產生一顆額外的能量球。同時: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so, as well as a chance to generate an additional Charge of a random type.
輔助弓的攻擊。每以被輔助技能發出三次射擊，獲得額外閃電傷害。: Supports Bow Attacks. Every third shot with Supported Skills Gains Damage as extra Lightning Damage.
輔助會在連擊最後造成最終打擊的打擊技能，使最終打擊受到先祖強化。: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, causing the Final Strike to be Ancestrally Boosted.
輔助攻擊技能，使其撲殺擊中的稀有和傳奇敵人，並增加其撲殺敵人的門檻。: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit, and increasing the threshold at which they will Cull Enemies.
輔助投射物技能，使其投射物穿透所有擊中的敵人，但穿透後造成的傷害會減少。: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an unlimited number of enemies, losing damage as they do so.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其物理傷害可以釘身，但無法再擊暈敵人。被輔助技能的釘身: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun. Pin buildup caused by Supported Skill is lessened, but Pin duration is significantly longer.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，有一定機率使敵人中毒，並對流血的敵人造成更強力的中毒。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies and causing it to inflict more powerful Poisons against Bleeding Enemies.
輔助投射物技能，使投射物的行進更為快速，並使投射物速度的增減也套用於傷害。: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and causing increases and reductions to Projectile speed to also apply to Damage.
輔助近戰攻擊。若你在過去兩秒內以投射物攻擊擊中，被輔助技能造成的近戰傷害便會提高: Supports Melee Attacks. Supported Skills deal more Melee damage if you have struck with a Projectile Attack Hit in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal Projectile Damage.
輔助攻擊，使攻擊加快，但傷害減少。: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster at the cost of Damage.
輔助生成投射物的技能。若你在過去兩秒內以近戰擊中，被輔助技能的投射物傷害便會提高: Supports Skills which create Projectiles. Supported Skills deal more damage with Projectiles if you have struck with a Melee Hit in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal Melee Damage.
輔助具冷卻時間的技能，使其在該次冷卻時間內可額外使用一次且使用時可恢復生命。\n:
Supports skills with cooldowns, giving them extra uses of that cooldown and causing them to restore Life on use.
Cannot support instant or triggered skills, or modify the skills of minions.
輔助任何造成傷害的技能，使效果持續時間少於一秒的技能造成更多非異常狀態的持續傷害: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing effects with a duration of one second or less to deal more non-Ailment damage over time.
輔助所有會製造投射物的技能，消耗額外的投射物，讓這些投射物在擊中地形時造成連鎖，: Supports any Skill which creates Projectiles, causing those Projectiles to Chain when impacting terrain, at the cost of any additional Projectiles, as well as causing them to always Pierce.
輔助在完美時機釋放將擁有特殊效果的引導技能，使其在完美時機釋放時造成更多傷害並賦: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage and grant Perfect Deflection if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.
輔助創造出一道直線牆的技能，使其改為沿著裂縫創造出一道牆，但減少傷害及效果範圍。: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a Fissure, at the cost of damage and Area of Effect.
輔助火焰法術技能。以被輔助技能點燃時，有一定機率獲得火焰統治者。: Supports Fire Spell Skills. You have a chance to gain Flame Archon when Igniting with Supported Skills.
輔助詛咒技能，使這些詛咒無視一般詛咒上限，但會反射至你身上。: Supports Curse Skills, causing those Curses to ignore the usual Curse Limit, but be reflected back to you.
輔助帶有號令技能的召喚物。被輔助的召喚物使用的號令技能有大幅提高的冷卻恢復速度，: Supports Minions which have Command Skills. Supported Minions have massively increased cooldown recovery speed for Command Skills they use, but deal no damage with non-Command Skills.
輔助任何有等級的技能，增加其等級和品質，並減少其消耗和保留。: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing the cost and Reservation.
輔助, 族裔, 法術, 範圍效果, 混沌, 詛咒, 危險: Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE, Chaos, Curse, Hazard
輔助詛咒技能。被輔助的詛咒技能會產生危險區域，只要敵人進入這些區域內就會爆炸，其: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create Hazardous areas which explode when Enemies enter them, Cursing Enemies and dealing Chaos Damage based on your Intelligence.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其擊殺感電敵人時恢復能量護盾。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Energy Shield when it kills a Shocked enemy.
輔助會造成傷害型擊中的技能，賦予其額外混沌傷害，並使混沌傷害貢獻至感電。: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Shock.
輔助會觸發其他技能的技能。由被輔助的技能所觸發的技能，在被觸發時的傷害、效果範圍: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage, Area of Effect, and Projectile Speed randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.
輔助可發射投射物的技能。當最初的投射物擊中冰凍的敵人時，被輔助技能的投射物必定會: Supports Skills which can fire Projectiles. Projectiles from Supported Skills always Fork when the initial Projectile Hits Frozen Enemies, but Supported Skills cannot build up Freeze themselves.
輔助詛咒技能。於被輔助的詛咒最後一段持續時間內，受被輔助技能施加的詛咒影響的敵人: Supports Curse Skills. Enemies Cursed by Supported Skills are Pacified for the final portion of the Supported Curse's duration.
輔助奉獻技能，使影響你周圍一定範圍或目標位置的法術也會影響被輔助奉獻周圍的區域。: Supports Offering Skills, causing Spells that affect an area around you or a target location to also affect the area around Supported Offerings.
輔助可命令的召喚物，使你與被輔助的召喚物在你號令他們時獲得不潔之力。: Supports Commandable Minions causing you and the Supported Minion to gain Unholy Might when you Command them.
輔助可創造能受到傷害的盟友的技能。由被輔助技能產生的召喚物會承受你原本要承受的一: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life. A percentage of Damage taken this way is Recouped by you as Life.
輔助創造出持續召喚物的技能，使這些召喚物在承受致命傷害時仍可持續戰鬥，並在一小段: Supports skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a short duration or when they take further damage exceeding their maximum Life. Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed on entering this state.
輔助任何可以造成傷害的技能，每使用一個不同的號令技能，使其造成更多傷害。: Supports any Skill that can deal Damage, causing it to deal more Damage per different Command Skill used.
輔助發射火焰投射物的法術技能，使施放速度的增減同時套用至投射物速度。: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles, causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to Projectile speed.
輔助投射物法術。被輔助的法術按遞增機率以環形發射更多額外的投射物。引起環狀發射後: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have an increasingly higher chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle, resetting when they do.
輔助影響範圍為自身周圍或一個目標位置的法術。被輔助的法術會迴響兩次，在短暫延遲後: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported Spells echo twice, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay, but Supported Skills are given a short Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling skills, Remote skills, skills which already have a Cooldown, or skills which are Triggered.
輔助攻擊，使其獲得冰冷傷害，但造成更少火焰和閃電傷害。: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Cold Damage but deal less Fire and Lightning Damage.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其更容易對滿血敵人造成暴擊。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Critically Hit enemies on full life.
輔助你自己施放的法術，追蹤你施放法術所消耗的魔力。消耗足夠的魔力時，會獲得魔力恢: Supports Spells you cast yourself, tracking the mana you spend to cast them. Spending enough mana grants a burst of Mana Regeneration and Cast Speed.
輔助你自己使用的引導技能，使其引導的時間越長，造成的傷害越高。: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been Channelled.
輔助持續性的增益技能，使你在該技能啟動期間，可以獲得更多的魔力回復。: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Mana Regeneration while the Skill is active.
輔助任何有範圍效果的技能，使該範圍變得更小，但其造成的任何範圍傷害更高。: Supports any skill with an area of effect, causing that area to be smaller but any area damage it deals to be higher.
輔助擊中敵人的法術，提升其傷害，但無法造成暴擊。: Supports Spells that Hit enemies, boosting their damage but preventing them from dealing Critical Hits.
輔助產生冰晶的技能。來自被輔助技能的冰晶爆炸並造成傷害時，將會穿刺敵人。: Supports Skills which create Ice Crystals. Damaging Explosions caused by Ice Crystals from Supported Skills will Impale Enemies.
輔助詛咒技能，增強其力量。: Supports Curse Skills, magnifying their power.
輔助創造召喚物的技能，提高這些召喚物的元素抗性。無法輔助創造出無法被傷害的召喚物: Supports skills which create Minions, bolstering the Elemental Resistances of those Minions. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.
輔助所有你自己使用的技能，使它的效果範圍大幅增加，但是冷卻時間延長。: Supports any Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher Area of Effect but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
輔助任何你自己使用的傷害技能，使其造成的傷害大幅提升，但冷卻時間延長。無法輔助已: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal significantly more damage but gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
輔助你自己使用的攻擊，以受輔助技能冰凍一個敵人時，短時間內為你的所有攻擊注入冰冷: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with supported skills infuses all of your Attacks with Cold damage for a short time.
輔助你自己施放的詛咒技能，使得受詛咒的敵人在詛咒結束時觸發厄運枯萎。: Supports Curse skills you cast yourself, causing them to trigger Doom Blast on Cursed enemies when the Curse expires.
輔助創造出持續召喚物的技能，使這些召喚物在承受致命傷害時仍可持續戰鬥，並在一小段: Supports skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a short duration or when they take further damage exceeding their maximum Life.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其造成的冰凍持續時間延長。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Freeze it inflicts to last longer.
輔助任何有範圍效果的技能，使其範圍擴大。: Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger.
輔助你自己使用的傷害技能，使用時自你的召喚物汲取生命來強化技能傷害。只有在擁有生: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your Minions on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a Minion with enough life to drain the full amount.
輔助你自己使用的技能。被輔助的技能在使用時會消耗一個屍體，造成更多混沌傷害。無法: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume a Corpse on use, dealing more Chaos Damage if they do. Cannot support Triggered Skills or Reservation Skills.
輔助法術，使其施放得更快。: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster.
輔助能製造召喚物的技能，讓能夠以召喚物為目標的技能優先以被輔助的技能所產生的召喚: Supports skills which create Minions, causing your skills which can target Minions to prioritise targeting Minions from the Supported Skill.
輔助影響你周圍區域或目標區域的法術，使這些法術沿隨機軸向同時影響目標區域其中一側: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location, causing those Spells to also target additional areas on either side of the target area, along a randomly chosen axis. Cannot support Channelling skills or Remote skills.
輔助創造出一道直線牆的技能，使其改為創造出一道環形牆，但造成更少擊中傷害。: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less Hit damage.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其有一定機率在擊中時讓敵人凋零。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Wither enemies on Hit.
輔助法術技能。你的魔力高於最大魔力的 90% 時使用，被輔助的技能會造成更多傷害: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage while you are above 90% of your Maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.
輔助你自己施放的詛咒技能。被輔助技能在使用時消耗暴擊球，在消耗後獲得大量詛咒持續: Supports Curse Skills you cast yourself. Supported Skills will consume Power Charges on use, gaining significant Curse duration if they do.
輔助可對敵人造成傷害的技能。被輔助技能的非傷害型異常狀態的持續傷害影響的敵人，會: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies. Enemies affected by Damage over time from Supported Skills which was not caused by a Damaging Ailment have reduced Life regeneration rate. Only the strongest instance of this Debuff will apply. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.
輔助召喚物技能。被輔助的召喚物造成更多傷害，且號令技能的冷卻時間恢復率增加。: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions deal more damage and have increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.
根據所擊殺釘身目標的最大生命來造成物理範圍傷害。: Deal Physical Area Damage based off of the maximum Life of the Pinned target slain.
輔助主要技能。被輔助技能的能量產生大幅加快。: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills generate Energy significantly faster.
輔助任何你自己使用的技能，被輔助技能會引爆你身上的易爆。當你帶有一定數量的易爆時: Supports any Skill you use yourself, causing supported Skill to detonate Volatility that is present on you. Supported Skill can only be used while you have a certain amount of Volatility and cannot support Skills which already have another Condition. Does not support Triggered Skills.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其在凍結敵人周圍創造出數道冰緩地面。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to create patches of Chilled Ground around Frozen enemies.
輔助任何可擊中敵人的技能，使擊中穿透敵人冰冷抗性。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Cold resistance.
輔助擊中敵人和自己施放的法術技能，犧牲施放速度來提高傷害。: Supports Spell Skills that Hit Enemies and you cast yourself, boosting Damage at the cost of Cast Speed.
輔助引導技能。引導被輔助技能時，你會根據最大魔力獲得閃電荊棘。: Supports Channelling Skills. While Channelling Supported Skills, you gain Lightning Thorns based off of your maximum Mana.
輔助奉獻技能。被輔助的技能的增益效果提高，且造成更多傷害，但是在施放時會額外瞄準: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills have increased Buff effect and deal more damage, but will target an additional skeletal Minion when cast. If there is not an additional skeletal Minion to target, no damage or Buff effect will be granted.
輔助可生成持續召喚物的技能。被輔助的召喚物在死亡時，會為附近的友方召喚物恢復生命: Supports Skills which create Persistent Minions. Supported Minions will restore Life to nearby Allied Minions on death, as well as removing Ailments from those Minions.
輔助擊中敵人時可造成傷害的技能，使被輔助技能的所有傷害獲得來源改為被視為獲得額外: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies with Hits, causing all sources of Damage Gained to instead be treated as Damage Gained as extra Cold for Supported Skills.
輔助能製造地表的技能，讓那些地面隨時間經過而擴大，直至達到大小限制。: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those Surfaces to grow over time, up to a limit.
輔助所有你自己使用的技能，使造成暴擊的機率大幅增加，但是冷卻時間延長。: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to Critically Hit, but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使受其點燃的敵人有一定機率在死亡時爆炸。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it Ignites to have a chance to explode on death.
輔助生成痕跡的技能，使這些痕跡能在更遠的距離收集。: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away.
輔助詛咒技能，使其在施放後更快對敵人施加詛咒。: Supports Curse skills, causing them to Curse enemies more quickly after being cast.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其能更有效地冰凍敵人。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more effective at Freezing enemies.
輔助所有會製造冰晶的技能，使它們被製造出來時有較多的生命。: Supports any Skill which creates Ice Crystals, causing them to be created with higher Life.
輔助所有會製造冰晶的技能，使它們被製造出來時有較少的生命。: Supports any Skill which creates Ice Crystals, causing them to be created with lower Life.
輔助會造成非異常狀態持續傷害的法術，使其具有較短的持續時間，但對滿血敵人施加的減: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment damage over time, causing them to have a shorter duration but deal substantially more damage over time with Debuffs inflicted against enemies on full life.
輔助會造成傷害性擊中的技能。被輔助的技能造成閃電傷害時會創造活躍閃電召喚物，它們: Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Living Lightning Minions are created when dealing Lightning damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with Chaining Attacks. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by Minions.
輔助創造可受到傷害之盟友的技能。由被輔助技能產生的召喚物會承受你原本要承受的一部: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life.
輔助任何擊中敵人的法術，使其暴擊觸發魔力閃焰。魔力閃焰會消耗你的魔力並造成火焰傷: Supports any Spell that Hits enemies, causing it to trigger a Mana Flare on Critical Hit. The Mana Flare consumes your Mana to deal Fire damage. Cannot support the skills of Minions.
輔助創造圖騰的技能。由被輔助的技能創造的圖騰會生成一個魔力之泉，為身處其中的友方: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by supported Skills generate a Font of Mana which will Leech Mana to Allies within it.
輔助攻擊，使其物理傷害偷取魔力。: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Mana.
輔助創造出召喚物的技能，使其貧血時發生劇烈爆炸。: Supports skills which create Minions, causing them to violently explode when reduced to Low Life.
輔助持續增益效果的技能，使你在被輔助技能生效期間有全滿的能量護盾時，造成更多的法: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其較常暴擊，但造成更少的暴擊傷害。: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to Critically Hit more often but deal less damage with Critical Hits.
輔助能對敵人造成曝曬的技能，提高所施加曝曬的效果。: Supports Skills which apply Exposure to Enemies, increasing the effect of applied Exposure.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使你在感電一個敵人時，有一定機率同時感電附近的敵人。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to also Shock nearby enemies when you Shock an enemy.
輔助影響範圍為自身周圍或一目標位置的法術。受輔助的法術會迴響，在短暫延遲後再次發: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported Spells echo, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay. Cannot support Channelling skills Remote skills or skills which are Triggered.
輔助造成傷害的技能，近期使用的每一種不同元素類型的技能都會提高被輔助的技能所造成: Supports Skills which deal Damage, raising Elemental Damage dealt for each Skill used Recently of a different Elemental type. Cannot support Minion Skills.
輔助持續增益效果的技能，使你在被輔助技能生效期間若沒有滿魔力，召喚物的傷害便會提: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，在短暫延遲後將其造成的點燃散播至附近的敵人。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, Spreading Ignites it inflicts to nearby enemies after a delay.
輔助攻擊，使其獲得混沌傷害，但同時減少其他類型的傷害。: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Chaos Damage but deal less Damage of other Types.
輔助你自己使用、擊中敵人時會造成傷害的技能。被輔助技能會消耗一定百分比的最大魔力: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana Flask charges, Gaining a percentage of Damage as extra Lightning Damage per Mana Flask charge consumed.
輔助新星技能，讓這些技能在使用時，作用於目標位置，而非以你為中心。: Supports Nova Skills, causing those Skills to take place at the targeted location when used instead of around you.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其對冰凍的敵人造成更多傷害，但消耗其冰凍狀態。無法輔助: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage to Frozen enemies but consume their Freeze. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.
輔助可造成非異常狀態混沌持續傷害的法術。因輔助技能造成的減益效果而受到持續傷害的: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment Chaos damage over time. Enemies taking damage over time from Debuffs caused by supported skills will suffer Freeze build up from Chaos damage Hits from any source. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.
輔助消耗屍體的技能，使其有一定機率在生效時不摧毀屍體。: Supports skills that consume Corpses, giving them a chance to take effect without destroying the Corpse.
輔助詛咒技能。被輔助的詛咒技能會產生區域，只要敵人在這些區域內，就會受到詛咒。: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create areas which Curse Enemies so long as they are within them.
輔助詛咒技能。受詛咒的敵人身體會腐化，承受混沌持續傷害。: Supports Curse skills. Cursed enemies' bodies decay, taking Chaos damage over time.
輔助造成非異常狀態持續傷害的法術，使其在對敵人施加持續傷害的減益效果時，消耗敵人: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment damage over time, causing them to consume Ailments on enemies it applies damage over time Debuffs to in order to deal substantially more damage over time.
輔助, 法術, 範圍效果, 觸發, 閃電, 冰冷, 火焰, 遣散: Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Lightning, Cold, Fire, Payoff
輔助任何擊中敵人的法術，使其擊中時消耗元素異常狀態，並觸發元素解放。無法輔助召喚: Supports any Spell that Hits enemies, causing it to consume Elemental Ailments on hit to trigger an Elemental Discharge. Cannot support the skills of Minions.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其造成更高的元素傷害，但無法造成異常狀態。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more Elemental Damage but be unable to inflict Elemental Ailments.
輔助會觸發其他技能的祈願技能。被輔助的技能擁有明顯更高的最大能量。: Supports Invocation Skills which Trigger other Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Maximum Energy.
輔助主要技能。被輔助的技能在觸發或祈求其他技能時，有機率返還一部分的能量消耗。: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills gain a chance to partially Refund a portion of Energy cost when Triggering or Invoking other Skills.
輔助生成復甦的持續召喚物的技能。當那些召喚物陣亡時，你會補償最大魔力一定百分比的: Supports Skills which create Reviving Persistent Minions. When those Minions die, you Recoup a percentage of your maximum Mana.
輔助所有你自己使用的技能，使造成異常狀態的機率大幅增加，但是冷卻時間延長。: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to inflict Ailments on hit, but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
輔助造成擊中傷害的法術技能。使用被輔助的法術時會令你犧牲一部分生命，以獲得額外的: Supports Spell Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Using supported Spells will cause you to Sacrifice a portion of your Life on use, gaining extra Chaos Damage in exchange. Does not support Persistent Skills, Minion Skills, or Triggered Skills.
輔助創造召喚物的技能，提升其造成及承受的傷害。無法輔助創造出無法被傷害的召喚物的: Supports skills which create Minions, making them deal and take more damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.
輔助生成痕跡的技能，使這些痕跡能在更遠的距離收集，有一定機率生成一個額外的痕跡。: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away, with a chance to create an additional Remnant.
輔助會觸發其他技能的技能。由被輔助的技能所觸發的技能，在被觸發時的消耗和傷害會隨: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，在點燃一名冰凍敵人時消耗冰凍，強化點燃效果。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Consume Freeze on Igniting a Frozen enemy to boost the effect of the Ignite.
輔助詛咒，在受詛咒敵人死亡時散播其效果。: Supports Curses, spreading their effects when a Cursed enemy dies.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其暴擊造成更多傷害，但降低暴擊率。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage with Critical Hits but have less Critical Hit chance.
輔助任何你自己使用的擊中敵人的技能，使其隨時間累積暴擊率。: Supports any skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to accumulate Critical Hit chance over time.
輔助任何有範圍效果的技能，使其範圍擴大但減少傷害。: Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger at the cost of damage.
輔助會召喚召喚物的技能。你召喚越多不同種類的復甦召喚物，被輔助的召喚物便會造成更: Supports Skills which summon Minions. Supported Minions deal more Damage the more different kinds of Reviving Minions you have summoned.
輔助詛咒技能，使其範圍更廣，但需要更長時間來詛咒敵人。: Supports Curse skills, causing them to cover a larger area but take longer to Curse enemies.
輔助能製造召喚物的技能，讓能夠以召喚物為目標的技能優先以被輔助的技能所產生的召喚: Supports skills which create Minions, causing your skills which can target Minions to prioritise targeting Minions from the Supported Skill, as well as causing them to always be considered Detonatable.
輔助奉獻技能。使用被輔助的技能時會犧牲你的一部分生命，但是造成更多傷害，並且獲得: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills Sacrifice a portion of your life on use, but deal much more damage and have more powerful Buffs in return.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，延長對受點燃敵人的感電效果。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, prolonging Shocks they inflict on Ignited enemies.
輔助持續增益效果的技能，使你在被輔助技能生效期間，施加在你身上的感電效果持續時間: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Shock applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
輔助你自己使用、可擊中敵人的技能。當你摧毀冰晶時，被輔助技能會獲得等同於其傷害一: Supports Skills you use yourself which can Hit Enemies. Supported Skills Gain a percentage of their Damage as Cold Damage when you destroy Ice Crystals.
輔助你自己使用、可造成傷害性擊中的技能。被輔助技能暴擊時會賦予易爆。: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills grant Volatility on Critical Hit.
輔助創造出一道直線牆的技能，使其改為創造出一道環形牆，但造成更少擊中傷害且效果範: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less Hit damage and have lowered Area of Effect.
輔助投射物法術。被輔助的法術有機率以環形發射更多額外的投射物。: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.
輔助法術技能。 使用時若你的魔力高於最大魔力的 90%，被輔助的技能會造成更多傷: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage while you are above 90% of your Maximum Mana, and Recoup a portion of their Mana cost. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.
創造根據你一部分的最大魔力點燃敵人的點燃地面。: Create Ignited Ground Igniting Enemies based on a percentage of your Maximum Mana.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能，使其對敵人暴擊時造成曝曬。: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when it Critically Hits an enemy.
輔助會召喚復甦召喚物的Minions技能。被輔助的召喚物若近期被復甦，造成的傷害: Supports Minion Skills which summon Reviving Minions. Supported Minions deal significantly more Damage if they have Revived Recently.
輔助你自己使用、可造成傷害的技能。被輔助的技能會獲得一個等同於你智慧的能量護盾消: Supports Skills which you use yourself which can deal damage. Supported Skills gain an Energy Shield cost equal to your Intelligence, while also dealing more non-Ailment Damage over time based off of your Intelligence. Cannot support Channelling Skills.
輔助會召喚持續召喚物的技能。被輔助的召喚物更加龐大、具有更多生命，且會造成更多傷: Supports Skills which summon Persistent Minions. Supported Minions are larger, have more Life, and deal more Damage, but cost significantly more Spirit.
輔助召喚物技能。被輔助的召喚物對號令技能的冷卻時間恢復率大幅增加。: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions have significantly increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.
輔助混沌技能，使其獲得 1 額外等級。不能輔助沒有等級的技能。: Supports Chaos skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
輔助冰冷技能，使其獲得 1 額外等級。不能輔助沒有等級的技能。: Supports Cold skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
輔助火焰技能，使其獲得 1 額外等級。不能輔助沒有等級的技能。: Supports Fire skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
輔助閃電技能，使其獲得 1 額外等級。不能輔助沒有等級的技能。: Supports Lightning skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
輔助召喚物技能，使其獲得 1 額外等級。不能輔助沒有等級的技能。: Supports Minion skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
輔助物理技能，使其獲得 1 額外等級。不能輔助沒有等級的技能。: Supports Physical skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
輔助你自己使用的技能。被輔助的技能在使用時會消耗多具屍體，每消耗一具屍體造成更多: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume many Corpses on use, dealing more Chaos Damage per Corpse consumed. Cannot support Triggered Skills or Reservation Skills.
輔助法術，使你過去8秒每施展一個不同法術，使其施放得更快。: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster for each different Spell you've cast Recently.
重擊地面，將敵人擊暈並擊退，接著繼續前進，施展第二次的毀滅性重擊。: Slam the ground to Stun enemies and knock them away, then continue forward and perform a devastating second Slam.
召出一個圖騰重擊附近地面，對附近敵人造成多次傷害。碎裂地面被此重擊擊中時會噴發，: Raise a Totem that Slams the ground around it, repeatedly damaging nearby enemies. Jagged Ground erupts when hit by this Slam, damaging enemies standing on it. The Totem cannot create Jagged Ground. This Skill can be used while Shapeshifted.
向前衝鋒劃開地面，每一步都會留下一塊碎裂地面。衝鋒結束後，跳起並重擊敵人造成傷害: Charges forward, cracking the earth and leaving a patch of Jagged Ground with every footstep. At the end of your charge, a massive leaping Slam damages enemies and causes all nearby patches of Jagged Ground to explode, damaging enemies standing on them. Once you begin your charge, the use speed of this Skill is affected by movement speed instead of Attack speed.
運用點燃敵人所獲得的榮耀發出一聲戰吼，讓你成為岡姆的化身。在岡姆的化身作用期間，: Perform a Warcry using Glory gained by Igniting enemies to turn you into an embodiment of Kaom. While embodying Kaom, you Trigger Volcanic Steps while travelling, Melee Strikes and Slams are Ancestrally Boosted, and your Melee Strikes Trigger Volcanic Eruption.
啟動時會不斷的回復盛怒。: While active, you constantly regenerate Rage.
發射一支從上方落下的箭矢，引起閃電爆發。箭矢會嵌入地面，任何連鎖閃電光束可與其連: Fire an arrow that drops from above, creating a Lightning burst. The arrow remains in the ground, and any Chaining Lightning beams can Chain to it. When Chained to, the arrows charge up for a brief period before releasing another Lightning burst. The Lightning Arrow Skill reduces this delay, causing bursts to happen more quickly.

引導來為你的弓充能，接著放出一發強力射擊。在完美時機釋放會使箭矢在撞擊時爆炸，並: Channel to charge up your bow before releasing a powerful shot. Releasing with Perfect Timing causes the arrow to explode on impact and Consume Freeze on directly Hitting. Consuming Freeze enhances the explosion.

法術, 攻擊, 增益效果, 範圍效果, 投射物, 觸發, 冰冷, 持續時間: Spell, Attack, Buff, AoE, Projectile, Trigger, Cold, Duration
以你正在使用的弓或長矛作好準備，強化你下一個可施展彈幕的弓或投射物長矛攻擊，使其: Ready your active Bow or Spear, Empowering your next Barrageable Bow or Projectile Spear Attacks to Convert Physical Damage to Cold Damage and create Ice Fragments on Hit. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge. Cannot Empower Sustained Skills.
攻擊, 範圍效果, 投射物, 混沌, 可施展彈幕, 植物: Attack, AoE, Projectile, Chaos, Barrageable, Plant
對一個目標施加印記。該目標承受的下一次暴擊會啟動該印記，消耗它以造成額外傷害並賦: Mark a target. The next Critical Hit the target receives Activates the Mark, Consuming it to deal extra damage and grant you a Frenzy Charge.
對一個目標施加印記，使其更容易被感電。當帶有印記的目標死亡時，印記會啟動，並使一: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Electrocuted. When the Marked target is Electrocuted, the Mark Activates, granting a Buff which gives extra Lightning damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.
啟動時，閃避翻滾會產生一個幻影之體，在短時間內使用插槽中的遠程攻擊，之後消失。: While active, dodge rolling will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.
攻擊, 增益效果, 持續, 範圍效果, 投射物, 觸發, 物理, 持續時間, 危: Attack, Buff, Persistent, AoE, Projectile, Trigger, Physical, Duration, Hazard
印記, 攻擊, 範圍效果, 觸發, 物理, 持續時間, 遣散: Mark, Attack, AoE, Trigger, Physical, Duration, Payoff
對一個目標施加印記，使他們失血，並累積沉重暈眩。若他們在有印記時承受足量失血，印: Mark a target, making them suffer Heavy Stun build up from Blood Loss. If they suffer enough Blood Loss while Marked, the Mark will Activate, Consuming itself and releasing an explosion of blood when they are killed or Heavy Stunned. The Mark's duration does not expire while the Marked target is suffering Blood Loss.
發射一支帶有閃電能量的箭矢，會自動追蹤受到閃電異常狀態的敵人。擊中這類敵人會使箭: Fire a Lightning-charged arrow that homes in on enemies afflicted by Lightning Ailments. Hitting such an enemy will cause your arrow to release a damaging shockwave and Chain towards nearby targets, with those Chaining Hits also releasing a shockwave. After the final Chain, the arrow lodges into the ground as a Lightning Rod. Consumes Shock from enemies it Hits, but not Electrocution.
攻擊, 範圍效果, 投射物, 物理, 持續時間, 可施展彈幕, 疾風: Attack, AoE, Projectile, Physical, Duration, Barrageable, Wind
透過對敵人施加冰凍、感電或點燃來累積榮耀。當你達到最大榮耀時，可以呼喚阿茲莫里日: Build Glory by inflicting Freeze, Shock or Ignite on enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may call forth the Azmeri goddess Solaris, jumping backwards and throwing your Spear in the air. On landing the spear deals heavy damage in an area, then calls a divine skybeam that pulses periodically and creates expanding Ignited Ground. Modifiers to number of Projectiles fired do not apply to this skill.

使用弓或長矛時，駕馭一隻可騎乘的恐喙鳥盟友。騎乘時，你可以使用弓、投擲長矛和印記: Harnesses a Companion Rhoa you can mount while you're wielding a Bow or Spear. While mounted you can use Bow, thrown Spear, and Mark Skills, and are much less slowed while using Skills, but being Hit will cause Heavy Stun buildup. While you aren't mounted, the Rhoa will attack your enemies alongside you with its beak, but can be damaged.
增益效果, 法術, 範圍效果, 持續性, 閃電, 持續時間, 連鎖, 球體: Buff, Spell, AoE, Sustained, Lightning, Duration, Chaining, Orb
反射鏡面會在你的存在中週期性的出現。以法術投射物擊中鏡面時會使其碎裂，在被摧毀的: Mirrors of Refraction appear in your Presence periodically. Hitting a mirror with a Spell Projectile causes it to shatter, copying the projectiles in a nova around the destroyed mirror. Copied Projectiles may be copied again when colliding with other mirrors.
法術, 範圍效果, 投射物, 觸發, 火焰, 持續時間: Spell, AoE, Projectile, Trigger, Fire, Duration
法術, 投射物, 觸發, 閃電, 冰冷, 持續時間: Spell, Projectile, Trigger, Lightning, Cold, Duration
啟動時，你的復甦召喚物會儲存其最大生命的一部分，在死亡時成為可收集的殘酷痕跡。使: While active, your Reviving Minions store a percentage of their maximum Life in a collectible Grim Remnant on death. Using Grim Resurrection Consumes the Life you've collected to Revive up to that much total Life of dead Minions.
用骨刺穿透一具骷髏，使附近的召喚物進入狂暴狀態，只要骨刺存在，它們的技能就會更快: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike to send nearby Minions into a frenzy as long as the spike remains, making their skills faster and harder hitting.  The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.
消耗一具屍體或一顆暴擊球來創造一個短暫存在的殭屍。透過暴擊球創造的殭屍會被強化，: Consume a Corpse or Power Charge to create a short-lived Zombie. Zombies created from Power Charges are Empowered and also create two additional non-empowered Zombies.
法術, 範圍效果, 持續性, 火焰, 持續時間, 引導: Spell, AoE, Sustained, Fire, Duration, Channelling
透過任何技能消耗魔力來獲得燃料，並使用累積的燃料施展一道火焰波浪，對你前方的敵人: Gain fuel by spending Mana on any Skill, then use the accumulated fuel to conjure a torrent of Fire from your hand, Igniting enemies in front of you. The flames grow stronger the longer you Channel. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to also create Ignited Ground. Cannot gain fuel while using this skill.
如果一名敵人處於撲殺門檻內，則傳送至目標體內，使其發生劇烈爆炸；反之則為其施加減: Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the Cull threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a Debuff to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the Cull threshold during its duration. Can also be used on Ball Lightning Projectiles. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals Lightning damage to surrounding enemies. If targeting an enemy, the explosion also creates Shocked Ground. Creates a Lightning Infusion on successful use. Highlights enemies that can be Culled.
啟動以召喚積極攻擊的復甦骷髏掠奪者，可經由號令將其激怒。骷髏掠奪者會根據他們的盛: Activate to summon aggressive, Reviving Skeletal Reavers that can enrage on Command. Skeletal Reavers do more Attack Damage and gain increased Attack speed based on their Rage
使用骨刺刺穿一個骷髏以在骨刺存在的時間內為你的召喚物施加護盾，降低他們受到的擊中: Impale a Skeleton on a bone spike to shield your Minions while the spike remains, reducing the amount of damage taken from Hits. Taking a Hit that deals damage above a certain threshold will cause that Minion's shield to absorb all damage from that Hit, then explode.  The bone spike is itself a Minion, and shields itself. If it dies, shields on your other Minions disappear.
法術, 範圍效果, 持續性, 火焰, 持續時間, 風暴: Spell, AoE, Sustained, Fire, Duration, Storm
在目標區域降下火焰之雨。可消耗所有三種的元素灌注，受火焰灌注時明顯增大、受閃電灌: Rain a storm of flaming bolts over the targeted area. Can Consume all three types of Elemental Infusion, creating a much larger storm when Fire-Infused, causing lightning bolts when Lightning-Infused, and raining ice bolts when Cold-Infused.
啟動以召喚復甦的骷髏風暴法師，可經由號令命其對陣亡的骷髏所在處施放閃電風暴。: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Storm Mages that can call down a lightning strike on dead Skeletons on Command.
用骨刺穿透一具骷髏，在骨刺持續期間賦予你強力的法術傷害增益效果。無法影響你的召喚: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike, granting you a powerful Spell damage Buff as long as the spike remains. Does not affect your Minions.  The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.
增益效果, 法術, 範圍效果, 觸發, 閃電, 冰冷, 火焰, 持續時間, 條件: Buff, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Lightning, Cold, Fire, Duration, Conditional, Storm
透過以元素傷害 擊中 敵人來累積榮耀。當你擁有最大榮耀時，你能在持續時間內成為行: Build Glory by Hitting enemies with Elemental damage. When you have maximum Glory, you may become the walking Apocalypse for a duration, Triggering one of multiple powerful Elemental Skills at an interval while this Buff lasts.
啟動時會間歇性的創造自身行動的有益平行時間線。這些時間線中的你會使用你第一組可用: While active, visages of yourself from alternate timelines will occasionally appear and cast one of your Spells from your first valid Weapon Set. Until the next visage appears, your next cast of the same Spell aligns your fate, Empowering that Spell. Visages can only cast non-Channelling, non-Buff Spells you could cast that have no cooldown.
號令, 範圍效果, 投射物, 火焰, 持續時間, 危險: Command, AoE, Projectile, Fire, Duration, Hazard
號令魯兹安拋擲他的巨劍，在著地點的地面釋放危險的符文。如果敵人步入其中，符文將會: Command Ruzhan to hurl his greatsword, spreading hazardous runes on the ground where it lands. If an enemy steps on a rune, it erupts in a fiery tornado that deals Spell damage.
號令魯茲安召喚兩束燃燒的餘燼並向前發射。餘燼撞擊地面後會爆炸，造成法術傷害。: Command Ruzhan to conjure two volleys of flaming embers and fire them forward. The embers explode on impact, dealing Spell damage.
號令魯兹安傳送至目標位置。抵達時，巨靈將會對周遭敵人造成法術傷害，並將他的劍重擊: Command Ruzhan to teleport to the target location. Upon arrival, the Djinn deals Spell damage to enemies around him then slams his blazing sword into the ground, creating a wave of lava that also deals Spell damage.
號令克拉里在目標位置創造一道爆破，造成法術傷害並留下一道短暫持續一段時間的分身。: Command Kelari to create a blast at the target location that deals Spell damage, and leave behind a clone that persists for a short duration. This skill can store multiple charges, and using it again while a clone from a previous use is still alive causes that clone to explode, dealing even more damage.
引導並號令克拉里在你身旁一同引導，創造在目標位置懸浮的刀刃。你引導的時間越長，克: Channel and Command Kelari to Channel alongside you, creating blades that hang over the target location. The longer you Channel, the more blades Kelari will create. Upon release, his blades plunge into the ground and create shockwaves that deal Spell damage.
號令納維拉強化你的能量護盾，使其立即開始充能並在持續時間內增加你的能量護盾充能率: Command Navira to bolster your Energy Shield, causing it to begin Recharging immediately and granting you increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate for a duration.
號令納維拉以冰封周遭所有的有敵人在內的冰緩地面，造成高額法術傷害並具有極高的冰凍: Command Navira to fracture all nearby areas of Chilled Ground that have enemies standing on them, doing high Spell damage with extreme Freeze potential.
號令納維拉以將周遭的冰緩地面轉化為納維拉的綠洲，一道會使站立於其中的你和友方獲得: Command Navira to turn nearby Chilled Ground into Navira's Oasis, a mirage which grants you and Allies standing in it Flask charges and damage Recouped as Life and Mana. Plants in the area become Overgrown.
利用克拉里的力量以被動的消耗存在內的屍體，使覆葬甲蟲召喚物迸發而出。這些甲蟲會被: Harness Kelari's power to passively Consume Corpses in your Presence, causing Corpse Beetle Minions to burst forth. The Beetles passively follow you until Commanded. On your Command, they rush the target and explode.
釋放一道暫時的新星 並利用敵人露出的可趁之機。擊中可暈眩、可觸電、或是可冰凍的敵: Send out a temporal Nova to take advantage of enemies' moment of vulnerability. Hitting enemies that are Primed for Stun, Electrocution, or Freeze causes a visage of them to appear, lasting as long as the original target would have been affected by the form of Immobilisation used to create the visage. A portion of the damage dealt to visages is also dealt to the original.
召喚魯兹安，一名聽從你的號令的無敵火之巨靈召喚物。魯兹安會在你使用傷害型技能時現: Summon Ruzhan, an invulnerable Flame Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Ruzhan emerges to Strike enemies with his greatsword whenever you use a damaging Skill, and casts devastating Fire Spells when Commanded to do so.
召喚克拉里，一名聽從你的號令的無敵沙之巨靈召喚物。克拉里僅會在你對他發出號令時行: Summon Kelari, an invulnerable Sand Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Kelari will only act when you Command him to do so. Kelari delivers swift Hits with massive Critical Hit potential.
召喚納維拉，一名聽從你的號令的無敵水之巨靈召喚物。納維拉僅會在你對她發出號令時行: Summon Navira, an invulnerable Water Djinn Minion to do your bidding. Navira will only act when you Command her to do so, bestowing restorative blessings upon you and your Allies with her Spells.

每幾秒對附近一個沒有印記的敵人施加一個插槽中的印記技能。消耗插槽中的印記會使其重: Applies a socketed Mark Skill to a nearby unmarked Enemy every few seconds. Consuming socketed Marks will cause them to be reapplied to an unmarked Enemy. This reapplication can happen at most once every few seconds.
啟動時，發射遠程投射物攻擊會創造一道使用插槽中遠程攻擊的幻影，並在持續短暫時間後: While active, firing a ranged Projectile Attack will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.
