Failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Tasalio's Rhythm) will remove all Tasalio's Rhythm on you.
輔助你自己使用的攻擊。每次使用被輔助的技能會提高其攻擊速度，但在短時間內過於頻繁: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills gain more Attack speed each time you use them, but will become unusable if used too frequently in a short time frame. Sustained Skills will instead gain Attack speed periodically while being used.
輔助你自己使用或由你觸發的任何技能。被輔助技能無法透過任何方式消耗能量球或元素灌: Supports any Skill you use yourself or that you Trigger. Supported Skills cannot consume Charges or Infusion by any means. Cannot Support Skills which require Charges or Infusion to be used.
輔助投射物技能，使其以環狀方式發射投射物，但傷害較低。無法輔助從上方降下投射物的: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire Projectiles in a circle. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above.
輔助具冷卻時間的技能，使其在冷卻時間內可額外使用。\n無法輔助主要寶石、立即施放: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.
輔助, 攻擊, 增益效果, 範圍效果, 觸發, 物理, 混沌, 持續時間, 植物: Support, Attack, Buff, AoE, Trigger, Physical, Chaos, Duration, Plant
輔助會擊中敵人的植物技能。被輔助的技能會在擊中敵人時觸發劇毒膿包。: Supports Plant Skills which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Trigger Toxic Pustule on Hitting an enemy.
輔助會創造危險的技能，使該危險無法在創造之初的3秒內被觸發。: Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to be unable to be triggered for 3 seconds after being created.
輔助投射物技能，使他們以環狀方式發射額外投射物，以降低傷害和新增一個冷卻作為代價: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire extra Projectiles in a circle, at the cost of Damage and gaining a cooldown. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above. Cannot Support Skills which already have a cooldown.
輔助, 法術, 範圍效果, 觸發, 印記, 持續時間: Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Mark, Duration
輔助印記技能，使其啟動時觸發蓄電印記。 蓄電印記會在目標位置創造感電地面。: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to Trigger Charged Mark when they are Activated. Charged Mark creates Shocked Ground at the target's location.
輔助具冷卻時間的技能，使其在該次冷卻時間內可額外使用且進入冷卻時間時可恢復生命。: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown and causing them to recover your Life when a Skill is used and goes on cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.
輔助創造出一道直線牆的技能，使其改為沿著裂縫創造出一道牆。: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a fissure.
輔助火焰法術技能。以被輔助技能點燃時，有一定機率獲得元素統治者。: Supports Fire Spell Skills causing you to gain Elemental Archon when Igniting with them.
輔助你自身施放的詛咒法術技能，使這些詛咒無視一般詛咒上限，但會反射至你身上。: Supports Curse Spells you cast yourself, causing those Curses to ignore the usual Curse Limit, but be reflected back to you when inflicted.
輔助自身使用的攻擊和戰吼技能。以被輔助的技能凍結一名敵人會短暫的以冰冷傷害強化自: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with Supported Skills infuses you and your allies with Cold damage for a short time.
輔助, 族裔, 法術, 範圍效果, 觸發, 混沌, 詛咒, 危險: Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Chaos, Curse, Hazard
輔助詛咒技能。被輔助的詛咒技能會產生危險區域，只要敵人進入這些區域內就會爆炸，其: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create Hazardous areas which explode when Enemies enter them, Cursing Enemies and dealing Chaos Damage.
輔助奉獻技能。 被輔助的技能在使用時會犧牲一定比例的自身血量。當被輔助技能的奉獻: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills Sacrifice a portion of your life on use. While Offering spikes from Supported Skills persist, you are periodically granted a Power Charge. When spikes from Supported Skills die, Regenerate a percentage of your maximum Life and Mana per second based on the duration the Offering persisted.
輔助, 族裔, 法術, 範圍效果, 觸發, 物理, 閃電, 冰冷, 火焰, 混沌: Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Physical, Lightning, Cold, Fire, Chaos, Curse
輔助詛咒技能。被輔助的詛咒技能會產生區域，只要敵人在這些區域內，就會受到詛咒。來: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create areas which Curse enemies so long as they are within them. Cursed areas from Supported Skills gather power before erupting in a column of annihilating light after a moderate delay.
輔助會生成痕跡的技能。拾起來自被輔助的技能所生成的痕跡時會賦予卡塔爾的回春。: Supports Skills that generate Remnants. Picking up Remnants from Supported Skills grants Khatal's Rejuvenation.
輔助創造風暴的法術，增加其上限並以玩家為起始點並更快的移動至目標位置，但是降低其: Supports Spells which create Storms, increasing their Limit and causing them to move from the player towards the target location faster, but become less effective. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.
輔助會擊中敵人的技能，使其的魔力偷取基於元素傷害而不是物理傷害。: Supports Skills which Hit enemies, causing their Mana Leech to recover based on Elemental damage instead of Physical damage.
輔助會躍至空中的技能，使你著地位置周遭的屍體劇烈的爆炸，對周遭敵人造成傷害。: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing Corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.
輔助影響範圍為自身周圍或一個目標位置的法術。被輔助的法術會迴響三次，在短暫延遲後: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported Spells echo thrice, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay, but Supported Skills are given a short Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling skills, Remote skills, skills which already have a Cooldown, or skills which are Triggered.
輔助你自身施放的法術，施放時會使其效果重複出現五次，並給予其一個冷卻時間。無法輔: Supports Spells you cast yourself, making their effect reoccur up to five times when cast, but giving them a moderate Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling Skills.
輔助會創造冰晶的技能。使該技能如果允許的話，則消耗一顆暴擊球並在冰晶周圍創造冰緩: Supports any Skill that creates Ice Crystals, causing that Skill to Consume a Power Charge if possible to create Chilled Ground around the Crystal.
輔助, 法術, 投射物, 觸發, 閃電, 連鎖: Support, Spell, Projectile, Trigger, Lightning, Chaining
輔助會擊中敵人的技能。以被輔助的技能感電一名敵人時觸發雷鳴湍流，向周遭濕透的敵人: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Supported Skills Triggers Coursing Current, which sends Chaining Lightning Projectiles to nearby Drenched enemies.
輔助自身使用的攻擊和戰吼。以被輔助的技能冰凍一名敵人時會短暫的以冰冷傷害強化你的: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with supported skills infuses all of your Attacks with Cold damage for a short time.
輔助印記技能，使你的攻擊擊中被該技能標記的敵人時偷取魔力。: Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.
輔助由自身施放且會擊中敵人的技能。以被輔助的技能撲殺一名感電的敵人時會注能自身，: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.
輔助你親自使用、會擊中並對敵人造成傷害的技能。被輔助的技能會消耗你最大魔力藥劑充: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana Flask charges, Gaining a percentage of damage as extra Lightning damage per Mana Flask charge consumed.
輔助生成能量球的技能。當以被輔助的技能生成暴擊球時， 強化你的某些攻擊並在使用時: Supports Skills which generate Charges. When generating Power Charge with Supported Skills, Empower some of your Attacks to Trigger Spark Projectiles on use.
輔助植物技能，使它們在過度生長後觸發一次爆炸。: Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown.
輔助會消耗屍體的技能。以被輔助的技能消耗屍體時會回復藥水充能。: Supports skills that consume Corpses. Consuming Corpses with supported skills grants Flask charges.
輔助會擊中敵人的技能。以被輔助的技能擊中冰凍敵人時會使對其造成的物理傷害在冰凍期: Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills which Freeze enemies cause Physical damage against them to Break their Armour while they remain Frozen.
輔助印記技能，使其在啟動時不會被消耗。: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to not be Consumed the first time they are Activated.
輔助會擊中敵人的技能。以被輔助的技能沉重暈眩敵人時會在持續時間內增加你的法術傷害: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Heavy Stunning an enemy with Supported Skills increases your Spell damage for a duration.
輔助, 法術, 範圍效果, 觸發, 持續性, 閃電, 遣散: Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Sustained, Lightning, Payoff
輔助會擊中敵人的技能。當被輔助的技能感電一名位於其他被感電的敵人周圍的敵人時，觸: Supports Skills that Hit enemies. When Supported Skills Shock an enemy that is nearby other Shocked enemies, trigger Electromagnetism, sucking in nearby enemies, Hindering them, and dealing Lightning damage at an interval.
輔助, 法術, 範圍效果, 觸發, 持續性, 閃電, 持續時間: Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Sustained, Lightning, Duration
輔助會擊中敵人的技能。已被輔助的技能感電一名敵人時會 觸發靜電震盪，使該敵人成為: Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Supported Skills Triggers Static Shocks, causing that enemy to become a source of Lightning damage sending pulses towards nearby enemies.
輔助任何擊中敵人的技能。受到被輔助技能感電的敵人會同時承受一部分的點燃傷害為閃電: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Enemies Shocked by Supported Skills take a percentage of damage from Ignite as Lightning damage as well as Fire damage.
輔助由自身施放且會擊中敵人的技能。以被輔助的技能撲殺一名感電的敵人時會注能自身，: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage and grants an increased chance to Shock for a short time.
輔助法術技能。 使用時若你的魔力高於最大魔力的 90%，被輔助的技能會造成更多傷: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills have increased Mana cost Efficiency and deal more damage while you are above 90% of your maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.
輔助創造風暴的法術，使其以玩家為起始點並移動至目標位置。無法輔助被觸發的技能。: Supports Spells which create Storms, causing them to originate from the player and move towards the target location. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.
輔助自身使用且會擊中敵人的技能。以被輔助的技能暴擊時會在一段時間內以火焰傷害強化: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Critical Hits with Supported Skills imbue all of your Attacks with Fire damage for a duration.
輔助會擊中敵人的法術。被輔助的技能以物理傷害暴擊敵人時會施加目眩。: Supports Spells which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Daze on Critically Hitting enemies with Physical damage.
輔助你親自使用、會擊中敵人的任何技能，使其能隨時間累積暴擊機率，但會降低你的暴擊: Supports any skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to accumulate Critical Hit chance over time, but also reduce your Critical Damage Bonus.
輔助印記技能，使你的攻擊擊中被該技能標記的敵人時偷取生命和魔力。: Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Life and Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.
輔助任何會擊中敵人的技能，使其對冰凍的敵人造成更多傷害但消耗他們的冰凍狀態，並使: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage to Frozen enemies but consume their Freeze, leaving them Chilled. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

被輔助的技能會被元素地面強化，觸發與友方強化元素地面相同類型的催化解放。: Supports Skills which are boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces, Triggering Catalysing Discharge of the corresponding type when they are boosted by an allied Elemental Ground Surface.
輔助自身施放的法術，在施放時增加它們的範圍。無法輔助引導類或是擁有冷卻時間的技能: Supports Spells you cast yourself, increasing their area of effect when cast. Cannot support Channelling Skills or Skills with a Cooldown.
輔助植物技能，使它們在過度生長後觸發一陣爆炸，並使被擊中的敵人致盲。: Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown, Blinding enemies Hit.
輔助任何會擊中敵人的技能，給予其一個在感電一名敵人時有機率感電周遭的其他敵人。總: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to also Shock nearby enemies when you Shock an enemy. Always Shocks enemies which are Drenched.
